Ylab helps founders, organizations, and philanthropists navigate technological change, build exceptional teams, and create lasting social and economic value.

Start a conversation Explore our work →

What we do

How Ylab operates

01

Advise

Strategic guidance for founders, executives, investors, and mission-driven organizations navigating AI, growth, and organizational change.

02

Build

Incubate new ventures, experiments, and public-interest initiatives at the intersection of technology and society.

03

Invest

Support exceptional people and early-stage ideas through capital, networks, and operational expertise.

04

Convene

Bring together builders, researchers, policymakers, investors, and philanthropists to explore important questions and create new opportunities.

Areas of interest

Where we focus our attention and energy

AI & Human Capability

How artificial intelligence can augment and expand human potential — not just automate tasks, but create new possibilities for learning, creativity, and judgment. The most important question is not what AI can do, but what people can do with AI.

Healthcare

From clinical decision support to health system transformation, AI has genuine potential to improve outcomes, reduce disparities, and make quality care more accessible. The challenge is navigating the complexity of healthcare institutions while remaining focused on the patient.

Future of Work

AI will reshape labor markets, organizational structures, and the nature of meaningful work. The transition can be handled well or poorly. We explore strategies for navigating this change in ways that are equitable, humane, and broadly beneficial.

Writing & ideas

Essays and thinking pieces

Reflections on technology, institutions, and social change

Institution Building

Building Institutions for the AI Era

The technology is transforming rapidly. Our institutions are not. That gap — between what is technically possible and what our organizations can actually do — is where the most important work happens.

Read essay →

Current explorations

What we are working on right now

Amsterdam innovation ecosystem

Mapping the emerging AI and deep tech ecosystem across the Netherlands and broader Europe.

AI for healthcare

Evaluating early-stage companies and initiatives applying AI to clinical and health system challenges.

Talent networks

Building and connecting communities of exceptional builders, researchers, and operators.

Philanthropic innovation

New models for deploying philanthropic capital at the intersection of technology and social impact.

Institution design

How to structure organizations — in government, civil society, and the private sector — that can operate effectively in a rapidly changing technological environment.

Public-interest technology

Supporting the growing field of technologists working on civic, government, and social challenges.
